sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, angle FLOAT, bit_value BIT, NULL_value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 0.5, '101'::BIT, NULL), (2, 1.0, '110'::BIT, 0.0), (3, NULL, '111'::BIT, NULL);
SELECT id, cot(angle) AS cot_value, xor(bit_value, '011'::BIT) AS xor_result FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, cot(1.0 + 0.5) AS nested_cot_value, xor(bit_value, xor('010'::BIT, '001'::BIT)) AS nested_xor FROM test_table;
SELECT id, cot(COALESCE(NULL_value, 1)) AS coalesce_cot_value, xor(bit_value, '000'::BIT) AS xor_with_zero FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE angle < 2.0);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM (SELECT id, cot(angle) AS cot_angle FROM test_table GROUP BY id, angle HAVING cot(angle) > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT A.id, A.angle, xor(B.bit_value, '000'::BIT) FROM test_table AS A JOIN (SELECT id, bit_value FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL) AS B ON A.id = B.id;
SELECT *, xor(bit_value, '111'::BIT) AS full_xor FROM (SELECT id, cot(angle) AS cot_value FROM test_table WHERE angle IS NOT NULL) AS inner_query;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT id, cot(angle) * 100, bit_value FROM test_table ORDER BY angle DESC LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, cot(angle) AS cot_value, xor(bit_value, '001'::BIT) FROM test_table WHERE NULL_value IS NULL;
